chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT AT LARKANA Constt: Petition No.D-49 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge Present: Mr.Justice Irshad Ali Shah. Mr.Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana. 1. For orders on M.A.No.177/2024 (U/A). 2. For orders on office objection “A”. 3. For orders on M.A.No.178/2024 (E/A). 4. For hearing of main case. 23.01.2024 Mr. Riaz Ahmed Soomro, Advocate for the petitioner. *-*-*-*-*-*-*-*-* 1. Granted. 2. Over-ruled. 3. Granted subject to all just exception. 4. The petitioner by way of instant constitutional petition has sought for direction against the respondents for change of Polling Station GPS Ilyas Wadho to GPS Ali Murad Seelro of PS-09, Shikarpur-III, in order to avoid law and order situation. If the petitioner was having a genuine grievance on change of above said polling station, then he ought to have objected to such action, when it was going to be taken. The election is at the verge of its’ completion and order of shifting of polling station from one to other place would amount to an interference with the smooth election process, which could not be permitted by this Court at this stage that too without any lawful or reasonable justification. In view of above, the instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. JU JUDGE
